releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Edited the descriptions for different input events

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added input modal for local issue path
Added ability to set main file
Added ability to press enter/return or escape on the input modal to submit or reject the input, respectively

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added a relative path option for an issue folder to add linkage to an "_Info" file
Example: If path is "issues", then a linked jira issue will be "issues/ISSUE-123/_Info"

Also corrected lingering JIRA labels to Jira

Duplicate of 1.0.5, just missed the version update

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added a relative path option for an issue folder to add linkage to an "_Info" file

Also corrected lingering JIRA labels to Jira

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Jira Linker for Obsidian with fixes for Obsidian Automated Review Process and Pull Request with manifest description fix

This will allow you to create/insert links to your JIRA instance
